summary: Completed testing of ASR Enterprises Solar CRM Staff Management features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All staff-related features working correctly including Staff Login, Staff Portal, Admin CRM Team tab, and lead assignment.
critical_code_review_comments: StaffPortal.js has a React Hook warning for missing dependency 'fetchAllData' in useEffect - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test leads and staff accounts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff login works with ASR1001/asr@123. Admin OTP is mocked to 131993. Staff accounts are auto-generated with ASR prefix (ASR1001, ASR1002, etc.). Lead assignment is done via dropdown in Admin CRM Leads tab.

staff_login.details: Staff can login with Staff ID (ASR1001) and password (asr@123). Login form has proper data-testid attributes.

staff_portal.details: Staff Portal shows Dashboard, My Leads, and Follow-ups tabs. Dashboard shows stats, pipeline, and recent leads. My Leads shows assigned leads with action buttons (WhatsApp, Call, Update, Set Follow-up). Follow-ups shows scheduled reminders with Mark Done action.

admin_crm_team_tab.details: Team tab shows all staff accounts with Staff IDs (ASR1001, ASR1002, etc.), contact info, stats (Assigned, Converted, Revenue), and Reset Password option. Create Staff Account button opens modal with Name, Phone, Email, Role, and Initial Password fields.

admin_create_staff.details: Admin can create staff accounts via /api/staff/register. Auto-generates unique Staff IDs (ASR1001, ASR1002, etc.). Default password is asr@123.

admin_assign_leads.details: Admin can assign leads to staff via dropdown in Leads tab. Shows staff name and Staff ID in dropdown.

staff_update_lead.details: Staff can update lead status and add follow-up notes via Update modal. Can change stage (New, Follow Up, Survey, Quotation, Installation, Completed, Lost).

staff_create_followup.details: Staff can create follow-up reminders with date, time, type (call/visit/quotation/payment), and notes.

homepage_no_admin_login.details: Homepage navigation only shows Home, Gallery, Calculator, Contact. No Admin Login button in navigation or footer.

mocked_apis.admin_otp: OTP 131993 is hardcoded for admin login - not sent via real email
